zh.lifeSummary: 當Mallt Verch Gruffydd於大約1362年出生在威爾士卡馬特史爾吉德維爾利時，她的父親Gruffudd "Hir" ap Rhys133歲，母親Cecily ferch Ieuan131歲。她和Maredydd Ap Henry Dwnn至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1410年在威爾士享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mallt Verch Gruffydd于大约1362年出生在威尔士卡馬特史爾吉德維爾利时，她的父亲Gruffudd "Hir" ap Rhys133岁，母亲Cecily ferch Ieuan131岁。她和Maredydd Ap Henry Dwnn至少有3个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1410年在威尔士享年49岁。

Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).

nameMeanings.name: Gruffydd
meanings: Welsh: The Welsh name; from creffydd, strong faith, or strong in faith. Gruffydd, a Welsh form of Gryffydd.

nameMeanings.name: Mallt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of Maud , a common name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Mallt Verch Gruffydd was born about 1362, in Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Wales, her father, Gruffudd "Hir" ap Rhys, was 133 and her mother, Cecily ferch Ieuan, was 131. She had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Maredydd Ap Henry Dwnn. She died in 1410, in Wales, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mallt Verch Gruffydd est née environ 1362, à Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Galles, son père, Gruffudd "Hir" ap Rhys, avait 133 ans et sa mère, Cecily ferch Ieuan, avait 131 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec Maredydd Ap Henry Dwnn. Elle est décédée en 1410, à Galles, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mallt Verch Gruffydd um 1362 in Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gruffudd "Hir" ap Rhys 133 und ihre Mutter Cecily ferch Ieuan 131. Sie hatte mit Maredydd Ap Henry Dwnn mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1410 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mallt Verch Gruffydd è nata il circa 1362 nel Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Galles, sua padre, Gruffudd "Hir" ap Rhys, aveva 133 anni e sua madre, Cecily ferch Ieuan, aveva 131 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con Maredydd Ap Henry Dwnn. Morì nel 1410, nel Galles, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mallt Verch Gruffyddが約1362年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアキドウエリーで生まれた時，父Gruffudd "Hir" ap Rhysは133歳，母Cecily ferch Ieuanは131歳であった。彼女はMaredydd Ap Henry Dwnnとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1410年にウェールズで49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mallt Verch Gruffydd(이)가 대략 1362년 웨일스 카마테실르 키드웰이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gruffudd "Hir" ap Rhys(은)는 133세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cecily ferch Ieuan(은)는 131세였다. 그녀는 Maredydd Ap Henry Dwnn(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1410년 웨일스에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mallt Verch Gruffydd nasceu aproximadamente 1362, em Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Gales, seu pai, Gruffudd "Hir" ap Rhys, tinha 133 anos e sua mãe, Cecily ferch Ieuan, tinha 131 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas com Maredydd Ap Henry Dwnn. Ela faleceu em 1410, em Gales, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mallt Verch Gruffydd родилась около 1362 г. в местности кидвелли, кармартеншир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Gruffudd "Hir" ap Rhys было 133 года, а матери, которую звали Cecily ferch Ieuan, 131. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Maredydd Ap Henry Dwnn. Она умерла в 1410 г. в местности Уэльс в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mallt Verch Gruffydd nació aproximadamente 1362, en Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Gales, su papá, Gruffudd "Hir" ap Rhys, tenía 133 años y su mamá, Cecily ferch Ieuan, tenía 131 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas con Maredydd Ap Henry Dwnn. Murió en 1410, en Gales, a la edad de 49 años.
